request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? While some argue for strategic autonomy, we must recognize that this could weaken our alliances and leave us vulnerable. Our partners in NATO and beyond are our strongest defense against emerging threats. Let's not isolate ourselves in the name of autonomy—strength lies in unity. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
